description_long: This is a modern outdoor bench featuring a series of horizontal wooden slats forming both the seat and the backrest, supported by a robust black metal frame. The bench has a gently curved backrest for ergonomic comfort and armrests integrated into the frame at both ends. The legs are designed as two wide, flat metal supports that provide stability and are likely anchored to the ground. The wood appears to be stained a rich brown, contrasting with the matte black metal structure. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for public spaces such as parks, sidewalks, or plazas. The bench is wide enough to comfortably seat multiple people and is built to withstand outdoor conditions.
description: A modern outdoor bench with horizontal wooden slats and a sturdy black metal frame, featuring a curved backrest and armrests. The design is sleek, durable, and suitable for public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bench, the horizontal wooden slats, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved backrest, the thickness of the wooden slats, and the flat metal leg support.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden slats and the continuous black metal frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the curvature and support structure.
